title: CFP_8 – Research | Duke Kunshan University
text:
CFP_8
Kunshan S&T announced the call for proposals for the 2024 Kunshan S&T Programs: link to announcement.
France Embassy of China announced Mobility Programs to Support Franco-Chinese Cooperation link to announcement.
Kunshan S&T announced the call for proposals for the 2024 Kunshan S&T Programs: link to announcement.
Kunshan Key Lab Program昆山市重点实验室项目申报指南
Discipline-based laboratories 学科重点实验室
Eligibility:
Relying on universities, institutes, medical institutions and other units, the laboratory has clear research objectives, R & D equipment, matching the direction of R & D, and possesses more than one patent for invention of core technology in this field;
have a domestic leading level of more than 15 full-time innovation team; establish a good laboratory project organization, talent introduction and training, assessment and reward and other operation and management mechanisms, set up an academic committee and hold regular meetings;
The new investment (excluding transfer of assets) during the construction period is not less than 3 million yuan; the R&D place is independent and centralized, with an area of not less than 500 square meters.
Enterprise-based Lab 企业重点实验室
Eligibility : please check the details in the link to announcement.
Innovation Group Programs昆山市创新联合体培育项目申报指南
Leading enterprises and research institutes are required to have outstanding independent innovation capability and possess core technologies. Innovation clusters in next-generation information technology, high-end equipment, small nucleic acids, and biopharmaceuticals in research collaborations with at least 6 Universities.
Members of the innovation Group. In principle, it includes key universities, research institutes, enterprises upstream and downstream of the industrial chain, financial institutions, etc. in the same industry, with no restriction on geography, and encourages the joint development of collaborative research by core scientific research institutes, universities and enterprises in the Yangtze River Delta region, as well as investment funds, with no less than 6 member units in principle.
Grant： 500,000 RMB per grant and 20 grants in this year.
Eligibility: Please check the detailed requirements through the link to announcement.
Kunshan International Research Collaboration Projects昆山市国境外科技合作项目申报指南
Key Country Technology Cooperation重点国别科技合作
Research collaborations with enterprises, universities, and research institutions in “Belt and Road” countries, utilizing overseas high-end talents, advanced research facilities, and innovative environments for research and development activities.
Cross-Strait Technology Cooperation with Taiwan Province对台科技合作
Research collaborations with Universities or enterprises in Taiwan Province.
Eligibility: 1) Both sides signed the research contracts between Sep 2023 and April 2024；2） Priority support for international science and technology cooperation projects introduced with the participation of technology transfer organizations and the Mayor’s Corps of Science and Technology(技术转移机构、科技镇长团参与)
Technology Transfer Program and Platform昆山市祖冲之攻关计划（产学研项目/平台）项目申报指南
Kunshan supports a group of influential and competitively positioned enterprises to collaborate with domestic universities and research institutions for the development of independent and controllable projects. The signing date of the cooperation agreement must be between August, 2021, and April, 2022.
Grant: Subsidy of 20% of the actual contract payment, up to a maximum of 1 million RMB.
Kunshan Key Technical Problem Research and Solution Projects昆山市祖冲之攻关计划（优秀攻关项目）“链群配”专项申报指南
It focuses on a new generation of 4 emerging industry clusters, which are information technology, high-end equipment manufacturing, new energy and green low-carbon, big health. It focuses on intelligent terminals, meta-universes and artificial intelligence, new energy and intelligent networked cars and other industry chains, to promote the transformation and upgrading of industries.
Eligibility：1）Enterprise will be the leading institute in the proposal. 2) R&D investment is not less than 3%. 3) It has milestones in place and high technical maturity of the project. 4) The project must have independent IP, high technological content and strong innovation.
Internal Deadline: June 21st, 2024
France Embassy of China announced Mobility Programs to Support Franco-Chinese Cooperation link to announcement.
Jeunes Talents France-Chine JTFC
This program supports the exchange of talented young researchers in the ﬁeld of science and technology. The program provides a mobility grant for research stays in a host laboratory in China (for French researchers) or in France (for Chinese researchers).
The scientiﬁc disciplines eligible for this program are the ones identiﬁed by the 2024 Franco-Chinese Joint Committee on Scientiﬁc and Technological cooperation (COMIXTE): Climate change and carbon neutrality; Environment and biodiversity; Ageing (health); Theoretical chemistry.
Bilateral program between France and China Submission deadlines: September6th, 2024
Cai Yuanpei Hubert Curien Partnership PHC
This program aims to support the creation of balanced Franco-Chinese research teams over a two-year period. It is divided into two sub-programs.
Cai Yuanpei – Project »
This sub-program ﬁnances research teams between France and China working on a science and technology research project.
Cai Yuanpei – PhD »
This sub-program supports Franco-Chinese teams of researchers co-supervising scientiﬁc work carried out during one or more doctoral theses (co-directed or co-supervised).
Deadline：June 11th 2024.
Support for the Organization of Scientific Conferences in China
The French Embassy supports the organization of Franco-Chinese scientiﬁc conferences/workshops in China by providing co-funding for 2024. Prior to submitting your application, please contact the higher education, research and innovation department by sending a letter of interest.
The Higher Education, Research and Innovation Department of the French Embassy in China contact details: science.pekin-amba@diplomatie.gouv.fr
If you are interested in applying for the programs above, please contact research-support@dukekunshan.edu.cn. Thanks.
